objective: Close F-0053 by making question create and update resolve material, knowledge_node and tag bindings inside the repository transaction; reject missing bindings, require available material and active recommendable knowledge_node for new bindings, preserve already-bound disabled references during unrelated edits and copies, lock checked binding rows through the write, and return a stable fail-closed input error without partial mutation. Do not change schema, execute a database, expand authorization, or address recommendation review semantics from F-0077.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
new role, entitlement, authorization scope, quota or default capability
recommendation review command, F-0077, paper composition or learner snapshot behavior
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApiCallers: Question editors and AI formal adoption submit public material, knowledge_node and tag identifiers through the existing question create/update contract; UI option filtering is not an authorization or integrity boundary.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: The question route delegates to question-service. The service currently validates shape and content images but does not map binding eligibility failures to a stable business response.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: question-repository currently resolves material before the transaction and silently maps a missing material to null; knowledge_node and tag bindings resolve after child rows are deleted, while knowledge_node checks existence only. The minimal fix is transaction-local shared row locks, explicit eligibility checks and pre-resolved child IDs before mutation.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: Existing material.status, knowledge_node.kn_status and knowledge_node.is_recommendable fields are sufficient. No schema or migration source is needed.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Repository focused tests will characterize missing/new-disabled/preserved-disabled bindings and stable ordered IDs; service tests will prove create/update map binding failures to 422 without success; affected P0, phase-9, formal-adoption and editor regressions remain green.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: US-02-01 permits explicit bindings; disabled material must not enter new content flows, while existing published/snapshotted references remain valid. Knowledge-node selection is limited to active recommendable nodes, while already-bound questions survive later node disablement.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No profession-match expansion, recommendation review state machine, real database concurrency execution, schema, permission, Provider, dependency or mechanism change.
